mission.title: opentelemetry: Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group
mission.description: Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
helm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry
```
The Java instrumentation SiG current owns all forms of instrumentation across Java applications.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group
steps.description:
> It's not me that mentioned Micrometer in the list 🤷 . Maybe you can arrange 2 meetings? I have no idea, I'm not responsible for arranging these meetings. I'm just pointing out that one hand you want a Micrometer expert but on the other hand when the lead of that project chimed in you told him that he can't join.

When did I say that he can't join? These are public meetings, scheduled at a time convenient for the largest number of engineers who are actively committing time and resources to

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Request for OpenTelemetry JVM Monitoring Working Group" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: > It's not me that mentioned Micrometer in the list 🤷 . Maybe you can arrange 2 meetings? I have no idea, I'm not responsible for arranging these meetings. I'm just pointing out that one hand you want a Micrometer expert but on the other hand when the lead of that project chimed in you told him that he can't join.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry installed or the issue environment reproducible.
